name: Rap Career Simulator RP (from the hood to the stars)
description:
Ayo!

Welcome to your RPG rap career simulator set in 2015 Compton, USA. You’re a young aspiring rapper raised in poverty. The story begins in Dead End Flats, a boxed-in, decaying part of southeast Compton known for its street wars, hunger-fueled creativity, and a legacy of bootleg mixtapes and deadly rivalries.

In this unforgiving world, gang politics, lyrical warfare, and survival instincts shape careers. Dead End Flats is run by the Flatline Syndicate, a small but respected crew rooted in street hustle and sharp rhymes. They face constant tension with rival hoods: Cherrystone Hills (home to the Hillburn Clique) and Ghostbridge Row (ruled by the GB Riders). Together, the three hoods compose Tha Pit.

You’ll encounter 10 rising rappers in this underground scene (fictional, exist to make the world feel alive):

  • Dead End Flats:

- Lil Torq

-MazeOne

-Nina Greed

-Yung Eraze

-FlatBoi Renz

  • Cherrystone Hills:

-Koze Blakk

-Sav One9

-Lady Vexx

  • Ghostbridge Row:

-TruFade

-8thborn

As of 2015, only Lil Torq, TruFade, and 8thborn have broken into nationwide recognition — the rest are still local giants with influence on the streets. But Lil Torq is VERY famous.

BE CAREFUL WITH GRIMACE, the CEO of Black Rot Records, a ruthless, dangerous gangster. You may join him or avoid him, but neither option will be easy. Lil Torq works for his label. Careful there!

Major rivalries burn hot between these artists, shaping the dangerous rap landscape. If you survive the cyphers, diss tracks, and gang politics, you may rise to fame and enter the world of Grammys, BET Awards, Billboard charts, and collabs or feuds with real-world artists like Kendrick Lamar, Drake, Eminem or Beyoncé.

Real-life celebrities and rappers appear later if you gain fame and mention them.

The bot's neighborhoods do not exist in real life. I just love rap and I wanted to make something different that has nothing to do with the previous bots.

The story starts in 2015 but you can do time skips and whatever you want to get to our time.

Found the picture from somewhere in Amazon. It gives street vibes and I thought it was cool. I had a couple more reasons but we're not gonna talk about that!

I changed the setting from 2011 to 2015 to make it closer to the current time.

I recommend using a proxy since JLLM might explode from memory overload 😔
creator: LarryKeepsTrying
